title: Petco Q3 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Petco Q3 2024 Earnings Summary. Revenue Performance: Petco reported net revenue of $1.51 billion in Q3 2024, marking a 1.2 percent year-over-year increase with comparable sales climbing 1.8%. Profitability Challenges: The company posted a GAAP net loss of $16.7 million, or $0.06 per share. However, this represented significant improvement from the prior year's $1.2 billion loss, which included a major goodwill impairment charge. Business Segment Results: Performance varied across divisions. The consumables segment expanded 2.7% while services rose 5.0%. Conversely, the supplies and companion animal business declined 2.8%, offsetting gains elsewhere. Operational Metrics: Gross profit grew 4.7% to $575.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA improved to $81.2 million from $72.2 million in the comparable period, demonstrating operational progress. Forward Outlook: For Q4 2024, management projects revenue near $1.55 billion with adjusted EBITDA between $90-95 million, though this includes minimum $10 million in consulting fees related to transformation efforts. Market Reception: The stock responded positively, gaining approximately 8% on announcement day, suggesting investor optimism about the company's trajectory.
